title: subagent-toolkit handoff sidecar
description: Machine-readable sidecar (report.json) written next to a handoff report (prompts/handoff-report.md) so orchestrators can triage many agents programmatically. Validate with harness/scripts/check_contract.py. Deliberately tolerant (additionalProperties: true) so harnesses can add fields without breaking consumers.

run_id.description: The RUN_ID from the brief; ties the sidecar to a trace tree.

agent.description: Agent slug (role or per-run identity, e.g. 'code-worker' or 'builder-b').

status.description: Machine-parseable outcome; mirrors the report's STATUS line.

artifacts.description: Paths to every deliverable produced. Each must exist and be non-empty; check_contract.py enforces this.

verified.description: Claims the agent actually checked, one per entry.

assumed.description: Claims the agent relied on but did not check.

implicit_decisions.description: Style, interpretation, and edge-case choices the brief didn't specify.

evidence.description: Paths to proof artifacts (test output, logs, screenshots) backing completion claims.

notes.description: Anything else the orchestrator should read, briefly.
